name: my-now-sdk-app
description: Offline Now SDK scoped application — build to an importable Update Set XML, no instance auth.

scripts.package:update-set: node tools/sdk-dist-to-update-set.js dist/app target/update_set.xml "My App - SDK Offline"
scripts.package:delta: node tools/sdk-dist-to-update-set.js dist/app target/delta.xml "My App - delta" --include=sp_*,sys_script_include
